title: Find My Device - Disconnected / Out of range device details
scenario: Find My Device shows last known location address, device status, last connection date, and battery percentage for a disconnected/out-of-range headset
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is paired but currently disconnected (out of range).
3. Navigate to the Home screen and tap the App Menu (hamburger icon or menu icon).
4. From the menu, tap "Find My Device". (Note: GPS location access must be granted to the app.)
5. Observe the gray geo icon displayed on the Find My Device screen.
7. Observe the new window that appears.
expected: A new window is displayed showing: the last known location address (street & city), the device name & status, the date of last connection, and the last known battery percentage.
